label: Free
description: Free to use (open-source or a genuinely free product). No card needed to get real value.

label: Freemium
description: Free tier to start, with paid plans for heavier use or advanced features.

label: Paid
description: Needs a paid subscription (usually a modest monthly fee).

label: Enterprise
description: Sold to teams/companies, often with sales-led or premium pricing. Powerful, but not a quick solo sign-up.
